title: Masānī Ammān
tagline: Masānī Ammān — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Masani Amman is a Hindu deity.
overview.description: Masani Amman is a Hindu deity. She is primarily worshipped as a family deity (kuladevi) by certain classes in Tamil Nadu, where She is regarded as an avatar (incarnation) of Adi Parashakti. Her chief temple is located in Anaimalai, Pollachi area, Coimbatore district of Tamil Nadu state, India. Arulmigu Sri Masani Amman Temple is a highly revered shrine situated in Anaimalai, which is located about 24 km (15 mi) southwest of Pollachi.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Anaimalai
topPlaces.description: Anaimalai is a panchayat town in Anaimalai taluk of Coimbatore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located in the north-western part of the state.

topPlaces.name: Vettaikaranpudur
topPlaces.description: Vettaikaranpudur is a panchayat town in Anaimalai taluk of Coimbatore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Located in the western part of the state, it is one of the 33 panchayat towns in the district.

topPlaces.name: Odaiyakulam
topPlaces.description: Odaiyakulam is a panchayat town in Pollachi taluk of Coimbatore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Located in the north-western part of the state, it is one of the 33 panchayat towns in the district.

topPlaces.name: Ramanamudalipudur
topPlaces.description: Ramanamudalipudur is a town situated in Coimbatore rural district, in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Aliyar River
topPlaces.description: Aliyar is one of the tributaries of the river Kannadipuzha. Kannadipuzha is one of the main tributaries of the river Bharathapuzha, the second-longest river in Kerala, south India.

topPlaces.name: Kottur, Tamil Nadu

topPlaces.description: Pilchinnampalayam is a village located in Pollachi Taluk, in the Coimbatore District of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Masānī Ammān?
faq.a: The best time to visit Masānī Ammān is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Masānī Ammān?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (52 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (48 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Masānī Ammān?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Masānī Ammān at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Masānī Ammān?
faq.a: Stays in Masānī Ammān start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Masānī Ammān?
faq.a: The top attractions are Anaimalai, Vettaikaranpudur, Odaiyakulam, Ramanamudalipudur, Aliyar River.
